home.heroSubtitle: Design, installation and maintenance of premium climate, heating and ventilation systems for homes and businesses across North Macedonia.
home.servicesSubtitle: From a single room to an entire building — we cover the full lifecycle: design, supply, installation and service.

home.ctaSubtitle: Our team visits, measures, and delivers a tailored quote within 48 hours.

midea.title: Midea — our flagship air-conditioning line
midea.subtitle: As an authorised Midea partner, Midea is the core of our range — full-inverter comfort from a single room to whole-home multi-zone systems, at the best price-to-performance in Gostivar and Tetovo.

services.pageSubtitle: Full service — from concept to commissioning.

heatPumps.title: Heat pumps
heatPumps.desc: Air-to-water and underfloor — efficient heating and domestic hot water.

ventilation.title: Ventilation & recovery
ventilation.desc: Fresh air 24/7 with up to 90% energy recovery.

maintenance.title: Service & maintenance
maintenance.desc: Annual contracts, emergency response and genuine spare parts.

products.pageSubtitle: Premium air conditioners, heat pumps and ventilation systems.

about.pageSubtitle: Akva System ZZ — HVAC craftsmanship from Gostivar.
about.intro: From our workshop in Gostivar, Akva System ZZ designs and installs climate, heating and ventilation systems for the most demanding homes and businesses across Macedonia. We believe in clean air, precise execution and long-term support.
about.missionText: To make premium comfort accessible — with fair pricing, uncompromising quality, and service that takes care of you long after handover.

quality.desc: Only certified equipment from leading brands.

precision.title: Precise execution
precision.desc: Clean lines, hidden runs, perfect air balance.

support.title: Support after handover
support.desc: Service contracts, emergency response, genuine parts.

faq.title: Things people ask us.
faq.subtitle: Can't find your question? Call us — we love a good HVAC chat.

items.q: How long does an installation take?
items.a: Most residential split systems are installed in a single day. Multi-split and VRF systems usually take 2–5 days depending on scope.
Yes — we partner with local banks for installment plans up to 36 months on installations above €1 500.

items.q: Is the site visit really free?
items.a: Yes. We come out, measure, advise, and send you a written quote at no cost or obligation.

items.q: Which brands do you work with?
items.a: We are authorised installers of Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Toshiba, Panasonic, LG, Samsung and Gree.

items.q: Do you service systems we did not install?
items.a: Absolutely. Our service team works with all major brands and offers annual maintenance contracts.
